entity.label: Hazor
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city in the south of Judah (Josh. 15:23). The name here should probably be connected with the word following, Ithnan, HAZOR-ITHNAN instead of “Hazor and Ithnan.”

nodes.label: Hazor
nodes.description: A city in the south of Judah (Josh. 15:23). The name here should probably be connected with the word following, Ithnan, HAZOR-ITHNAN instead of “Hazor and Ithnan.”

verses.text: And Kedesh, and Hazor, and Ithnan,
